messages.text: The fungal thrall closes cold, mouldering arms around you and squeezes, and where its overgrown flesh presses to yours the rot begins to spread. The blow {verb} you!
The fungal thrall gropes for you with rotted arms and you twist out of its slow, smothering reach.
The fungal thrall folds you into itself and holds you fast while its rot floods over you, drinking you into the garden! The blow {verb} you!
